banner.title: Byteplus Seedance 1.5 Pro AI Video Generator
banner.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is a joint audio-video model that accurately follows complex instructions. Can generate diverse voices and spatial sound effects that coordinate with the visuals to deliver a smoother storytelling. Support a wide range of languages and dialects with great lip-sync and motion alignment.

tabs.title: Text to Video
tabs.subTitle: Prompt
tabs.placeholder: Describe the video you want to generate...

tabs.title: Image to Video
tabs.subTitle: Image
tabs.tips: Upload JPG/PNG/WEBP images up to 10MB, minimum width/height of 300px.

features.title: Key Features of Seedance 1.5 Pro AI Video Model

details.title: Native Audio Generation
details.description: Can generate diverse voices and spatial sound effects that coordinate with the visuals to deliver a smoother storytelling. Support a wide range of languages and dialects with great lip-sync and motion alignment.

details.title: Film-Grade Cinematography and Visual Quality
details.description: Capable of complex camera movement, from close-ups with subtle facial expressions and emotions, to full-shots with cinematic level of details, composition, and atmosphere.

details.title: Strong Storytelling and Emotional Expression
details.description: Based on prompt intent, can auto-fill the narratives and keep the content cohesive across various characters' emotions, expressions and actions, suitable for short dramas, advertising, and social media.

details.title: Accurate Instruction Following
details.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro accurately follows complex instructions and understands nuanced prompts, making it ideal for short dramas, advertising, and social media content.

details.title: 10× Accelerated Inference
details.description: Production-ready speed without quality compromise. Our optimized acceleration framework delivers over 10 times faster inference than previous generation models, enabling rapid iteration and high-volume content production workflows.

details.title: Professional-Grade Quality
details.description: Meticulous post-training optimization through Supervised Fine-Tuning on high-quality datasets and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback with multi-dimensional reward models. Every output meets professional content creation standards.

usageGuide.title: How to Use Seedance 1.5 Pro
usageGuide.description: Generate professional videos with Seedance 1.5 Pro through our easy-to-use interface

steps.title: Select Seedance 1.5 Pro Model
steps.description: Navigate to 'Text to Video' or 'Image to Video' page and select 'Seedance 1.5 Pro' from the model dropdown menu.

steps.title: Enter Your Prompt or Upload Image
steps.description: Describe what you want to generate in detail, or upload an image for image-to-video. Configure your preferred aspect ratio, duration, and language settings for lip-sync precision.

steps.title: Generate and Download
steps.description: Click 'Generate' and wait for your video to generate. Once complete, download your high-quality video with synchronized audio.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about Seedance 1.5 Pro joint audio-video model

items.title: What is Seedance 1.5 Pro?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is a joint audio-video model that accurately follows complex instructions. It features native audio generation, film-grade cinematography, and strong storytelling capabilities for professional content creation.

items.title: How does Seedance 1.5 Pro achieve multilingual lip-sync?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro supports a wide range of languages and dialects with great lip-sync and motion alignment. The model generates audio and visuals simultaneously, ensuring perfect synchronization.

items.title: What makes Seedance 1.5 Pro different from other AI video generators?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is built from the ground up for joint audio-video generation with native synchronization. Unlike traditional models that generate video and audio separately, Seedance 1.5 Pro uses a specialized architecture ensuring perfect coordination. It also features film-grade cinematography, strong storytelling, and 10× faster inference.

items.title: Can I use Seedance 1.5 Pro for commercial projects?
items.description: Yes, Seedance 1.5 Pro is designed for professional content creation with film-grade visual quality and professional-grade output. It's ideal for filmmakers, marketers, advertising agencies, and content creators requiring high-quality videos with multilingual capabilities.

items.title: What types of content can Seedance 1.5 Pro create?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is suitable for short dramas, advertising, and social media content. Based on prompt intent, it can auto-fill narratives and keep content cohesive across various characters' emotions, expressions, and actions.

items.title: Which languages and dialects does Seedance 1.5 Pro support?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro supports a wide range of languages and dialects with great lip-sync and motion alignment capabilities.

items.title: How fast is Seedance 1.5 Pro compared to other models?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro delivers over 10× faster inference than previous generation models through its optimized acceleration framework, enabling rapid iteration and high-volume content production workflows.

items.title: Where is Seedance 1.5 Pro available?
items.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro is available on our platform for professional content creators. You can try it now through our text-to-video and image-to-video interfaces.
